title: Mobile/tablet/desktop device-size selector framing the embedded app

tests.summary: 4 passed (selector 3 options; Mobile=390px, Tablet=820px fixed; Desktop fluid==container width; persists across reload; present in mobile Browser tab)

typecheck.summary: 0 errors (transient cross-session runner.ts error cleared on re-run)

lint.summary: no lint configured for the fitting UI

codexReview.note: r1: real finding (weak desktop-fluid e2e assertion >600 -> a stuck 820 would pass) FIXED by asserting iframe width == container width; box-sizing finding hardened defensively (global *{box-sizing:border-box} already covered it). r2 clean approve

codexPwTest.note: Codex independently verified fluid desktop (697==pane 697), fixed mobile 390px, fixed tablet 820px, desktop restore, mobile persistence after reload; no console errors

designAudit.notes: selector reuses .segmented (clear green active state); Mobile/Tablet render the app at fixed widths in a centered, framed, guttered viewport (polished device-emulator look); Desktop fluid; on-system warm palette; header flex-wraps so no overflow on narrow panes
